headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts PT on The Hershey Company (HSY) to $247 From $238 – Here’s Why
summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY) is one of the best ethical companies to invest in now according to Reddit. Morgan Stanley lifted the price target on The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY) to $247 from $238 on March 16, maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares.
